name: Caffeine Lover's Gift Basket
recipeIngredient: Special teas (black, spice, fruit, cinnamon, blossoms)
Dark chocolate maybe with roasted cocoa bean pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Select a variety of high-quality coffee filters or use alternative items like socks or plated fabrics.
2. Choose an assortment of special teas that include black tea, spices, fruit-infused options, cinnamon, and blossom-flavored teas.
3. Include premium quality coffee beans for those who enjoy brewing their own coffee.
4. Provide a stylish mug or thermos to serve the beverages in.
5. Consider adding dark chocolate with optional roasted cocoa bean pieces as a sweet treat for your gift basket.
